LAW AND MOTION 301, FOR ORDER TRANSFERRING ACTION TO PROPER COURT AND FOR PAYMENT OF DEFTS EXPENSES AND ATTORNEY FEES NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- DEFENDANT KAREN E. MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- defendant KAREN E. ANDERSON's motion to transfer action is granted. Plaintiff to pay costs of refiling in Alameda county. Moving party's request for attorney fees denied. (JJM/CL) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
